description_long: This helmet features a smooth, rounded dome with a prominent brow line and a distinct, angular faceplate. The front displays a black visor slit, flanked by sculpted cheek areas and a series of vertical grill-like details around the mouth area. The sides are adorned with raised, circular ear covers and rectangular indents, while the back is seamless and curves gently downward. The surface is glossy and predominantly white, with black accents outlining the visor and mouth area. The helmet appears to be made of rigid plastic or composite material, designed to fully enclose and protect the head. There are no visible logos, graphics, or external fasteners, giving it a clean, utilitarian appearance.
description: A glossy white, full-face helmet with a black visor slit, sculpted facial features, and smooth, rounded contours. The design is clean and futuristic, with no visible logos or graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black visor slit, angular faceplate, and vertical grill details around the mouth.
description_view_1: Left rear three-quarter view highlights the rounded dome, raised ear cover, and rectangular side indent.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth, seamless back with subtle panel lines and no visible openings.
description_view_3: Right rear three-quarter view mirrors the left, showing the ear cover and side indent, with the visor edge visible.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: A series of small vertical slits are present around the mouth area on the front faceplate; no other vents are visible.
